sources.cleaned_content:
# Deotex by Fra-Ber Cleaning Captures and Removes and Eliminates Odors* for Cars

Price: €11,47

Format: 750 ml

Delivery usually in 3-5 days

### THE BENEFITS OF DEOTEX

Fra-Ber's Deotex cleans, captures eliminates and removes odors* from car interiors while leaving a pleasant musk and citrus scent.

Main features:

- Cleans, hygienises** and removes bad odours*: it delicately perfumes and cleans, effectively dislodging grime and removing unpleasant smells;
- Eliminates strong odours: it is effective in combating various sources of unpleasant odours including food residue, humidity, animals, vomit, urine and smoke;
- Ideal for seats and mats: it can be used on car plastic parts and upholstery fabrics including seats or floor mats;
- Musk and citrus fragrance: leaves a pleasant scent with each application;
- Leaves a scented touch: after cleaning the car interiors, the product can be used to infuse a lasting fragrance in the vehicle.

*The product contains an anti-odor molecule (zinc ricinoleate) that traps odor-causing substances on surfaces and promotes their removal by mechanical or physical means.

** The term "hygienising", if present, refers to a physical or mechanical action. For example, the mechanical action of the cloth exerted by the operator.

### DEOTEX IS IDEAL

- As a versatile car interior fragrance and cleaning product also suitable for use on plastic parts and fabrics;
- To finish off interior cleaning with an extra dose of fragrance on the floor mats, helping to maintain the refreshing sensation of a clean, freshly washed car;
- To perfume and address the root cause of foul odours in cars and all types of vehicles.

### HOW TO USE DEOTEX

We recommend using Deotex to clean, trap, eliminate and remove bad smells* from cars.

Main steps:

- Spray evenly on the surface or in the room;
- Leave on for 5 minutes, leave to dry and wipe with a cloth.

Use: use the product pure.

### SAFETY INFO & DATA SHEET

PRODUCT CODE: 701610 - R:1 DEOTEX ODOUR REMOVER 750 ML

SAFETY INFORMATION

CAUTION

H319 Causes serious eye irritation.
P101 If medical advice is needed, have product container or label at hand.
P102 Keep out of reach of children.
P103 Read carefully and follow all instructions.
P264 Wash hands thoroughly after handling.
P280 Wear protective gloves/protective clothing/eye protection/face protection.
P305+P351+P338 IN CASE OF CONTACT WITH THE EYES: rinse carefully with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses if present and easy to do. Keep on rinsing.

Contains: para-tert-Butylcyclohexyl acetate: May produce an allergic reaction.

Contains among other ingredients: Equal to or greater than 5% but below 15%: Non-ionic surfactants. Less than 5%: Cationic surfactants. Enzymes, Perfume (Coumarin, Geraniol, Citronellol, Benzyl salicylate, Linalool).

Data sheet download: https://fraberantegnate-my.sharepoint.com/:b:/g/personal/onedrive_fra-ber_it/EaX7lQYiuolFlHlCqfkqNPYBpokyMH3uRBaeoUYnynwCTA?e=MQ2GGY

sources.page_title: FRA-BER DEOTEX PLUS AEROSOL 250ML Deodorizing Sanitizing Treatment For Air Conditioning System | Garage Equipment Center | GEC Egypt
sources.cleaned_content:
# FRA-BER DEOTEX PLUS AEROSOL 250ML Deodorizing Sanitizing Treatment For Air Conditioning System

Price: 300.00 EGP

Internal Reference: CCCCXX00038

Category: Interior Chemicals > Deodorizing & Sanitizing

### Description:

FRA-BER Deotex Plus Aerosol is a professional-grade air conditioning sanitizer and deodorizer, designed specifically for car washing centers, detailing workshops, and car care professionals. It delivers a complete hygienizing treatment for vehicle air-conditioning systems, helping to eliminate bacteria, fungi, viruses, and bad odors trapped inside ventilation ducts.

With its high alcohol concentration (over 75%), the formula ensures deep sanitization while neutralizing odor-causing molecules. Tested according to EN 1276, EN 1650, EN 13697, EN 14476, and EN 16777 standards, it guarantees effective disinfection that meets professional car care standards.

The Deotex Plus Sany treatment improves air quality and refreshes interiors, leaving vehicles with a clean and pleasant environment — perfect for customer handovers and post-detailing services.

#### Directions for Use:

- Start the vehicle and turn on the AC in recirculation mode.
- Set the fan to maximum speed and open all air vents.
- Place the can on the passenger side floor, ensuring it's not facing the dashboard.
- Press the spray button firmly until it locks; the one-shot valve will release all contents automatically.
- Exit the vehicle, close all windows, and let the engine run for 10 minutes.
- Once complete, ventilate the interior for about 5 minutes.

Professional Tip: Recommended for car detailing centers, showrooms, and fleet sanitization services seeking a fast and reliable AC disinfection solution.

### Specifications

| Category | Interior Chemicals |
| Subcategory | Deodorizing & Sanitizing |
